name: Francesco Paolo Figliuolo
role: Extraordinary Commissioner for the COVID-19 Emergency
bio: An Italian Army General who served as the head of the COVID-19 vaccination campaign from March 2021 to March 2022, tasked with accelerating the national rollout.
_evidence: As the Extraordinary Commissioner, he was directly responsible for the logistical execution and management of Italy's national vaccination campaign throughout 2021.

name: Mario Draghi
bio: Served as the Prime Minister of Italy from 2021 to 2022, leading a national unity government during the height of the pandemic recovery.
_evidence: He initiated the strategic shift in the vaccination campaign by appointing General Figliuolo to replace the previous leadership, prioritizing rapid immunization.

name: Domenico Arcuri
role: Former Extraordinary Commissioner for the COVID-19 Emergency
bio: An Italian manager who served as the first Extraordinary Commissioner for the COVID-19 emergency until his removal in March 2021.
_evidence: His tenure as the initial commissioner set the baseline for the campaign; his perceived slow progress led to his replacement by the Draghi administration.
